items.title: Introduction to Statistical Learning (James et al.)
items.author: Gareth James, Daniela Witten, Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani
items.note: Clear treatment of correlation, covariance, and their role in linear models and PCA.

items.title: NumPy covariance documentation
items.author: NumPy Developers
items.note: Reference for `np.cov` and `np.corrcoef` behavior, including ddof and bias options.

items.title: pandas.DataFrame.corr
items.author: pandas Development Team
items.note: Pairwise correlation methods (Pearson, Kendall, Spearman) for EDA on tabular data.

items.title: Probability and Statistics (DeGroot & Schervish)
items.author: Morris H. DeGroot, Mark J. Schervish
items.note: Rigorous definitions of covariance, correlation, and properties of covariance matrices.
